name: Frozen Christmas Pudding
recipeIngredient: 4 oz jar (1/2 cup) maraschino cherries, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain pineapple and cherries, reserving syrups.
2. Chop the cherries.
3. Combine syrups and raisins; heat to boiling.
4. Add marshmallows; stir until dissolved.
5. Cool mixture.
6. Mix in pineapple, cherries, toasted almonds, lemon juice, and rum flavoring.
7. Beat egg whites and salt until foamy.
8. Gradually add sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
9. Fold the beaten egg white mixture into the main mixture.
10. Add cream.
11. Freeze the mixture in a refrigerator tray.
12. Makes 8 servings.
